sections.paragraph:
verb יכול

can, be able to; be permitted, may; to overcome

masculine noun and adjective

crook, scoundrel, shyster, villain, rogue, fraud, equivocator, faker, flimflammer, fraudulent, gouger, grifter, impostor, jackal, knave, miscreant, quack, quacksalver, serpent, shark, sharp, sha
